name: Suspect Svchost Memory Access
description: Detects suspicious memory access to `svchost.exe`. Adversaries may inject malicious code into `svchost.exe` to execute code, evade security defenses, and potentially disrupt services. This is a common defense evasion and privilege escalation technique.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a process is attempting to access the memory of **`svchost.exe`** with a suspicious access right (**{access}**). The call trace is **{call_trace}**. This is a strong indicator of **Defense Evasion** and **Process Injection** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1562.001**), where an adversary is attempting to hide malicious activity within a legitimate system process. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious process. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: access
parameters.description: The access rights requested by the process.

parameters.name: call_trace
parameters.description: The call trace of the process that accessed the memory.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
